The key insight is:
- We can translate sheets A and B anywhere
- We can cut out any H_X × W_X region
- The cut-out region must match X exactly (black where X has black, transparent where X has transparent)
- All black squares from A and B must be within the cut-out region

Since all dimensions are at most 10, we can brute force all possible positions.
